prerequisites.value: Elemental overflow class feature, kineticist level 15th.

description.value:
**Benefit:** Whenever you have accepted at least 4 points of burn, the chance to ignore the effects of a critical hit or sneak attack increases by an additional 10%. This chance increases by an additional 5% for every 2 points of burn you accept after that. This chance canât exceed 100%.

**Normal:** Whenever you have accepted at least 3 points of burn, your chance to ignore the effects of a critical hit or sneak attack equals 5% Ã your current number of points of burn.
